nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives focus_session_complete payloads from Express backend

nodes.name: Deduplicate Event ID
nodes.notes: Ensures exactly-once notification delivery by discarding duplicate session IDs. This is n8n's idempotency guarantee layer.

nodes.name: Compute Reward Logic (n8n Prototype)
nodes.notes: n8n-first: Reward rule implemented here first, then migrated to Express. See DECISIONS.md for migration rationale.
